title: This Bedrock is Unbreakable!
description: Adds a Pickaxe that can destroy bedrock with its right-click action.
body: # This Bedrock is unbreakable! ## Mod-Info This Mod provides a pickaxe, which can **destroy bedrock** with a right click action. It also adds the following: - Blue Slime: Can spawn above 100 blocks height in specific biomes. - Onions: A new food source. - New obsidian stone blocks and bricks which can be crafted with (crying) obsidian. ## Steps to Success ## Compatability with Farmer's Delight Kubejs compatability files exist for the version 1.20.1. You can download them [here](https://github.com/LeunoSam/BedrockIsUnbreakable/tree/master/compatability/farmer's%20delight/1.20.1). It's possible that those files also work for other versions, but it was never tested. ## Credits **Developers:** LeunoSam, snydto, JoLuKei, Squidy01
